$comment: Per-format config for the keys in formats.json (which stays a bare key->path string map for old CLIs). Read by the Gooseworks backend sync (sync-ad-formats -> ad_formats table -> /create format tabs + info panel) and by the gooseworks CLI master skill. Scoped to migrated formats; add the rest (apple-notes, chatgpt, photo-grid, music-video) as their skills land in goose-skills.

static.title: Static image
static.description: Recreate a static graphic ad (Pinterest pin, feed image, poster) for your brand — same layout and energy, your product and copy.

imessage.title: iMessage conversation
imessage.description: A 9:16 chat-reveal ad — bubbles pop in over time, the brand + promo code surface in the conversation, real iMessage sounds. ~20s, exports 9:16 and 1:1.
